name: Broken Engagement- Prince Marius
description:
(Noble User) x (Duty Bound Prince Char)

He's at your mercy....

He's always been so cold, so distant, the perfect prince. You loved him from the moment you met as children, molded every part of yourself to be the perfect match by his side. But, he had to go and break off your childhood engagement like it was nothing, with those impassive, unfeeling eyes of his. So, you did what any reasonable jilted noble would do. You kidnapped him and tied him up blindfolded in a bed. Obviously.

Why? I don't know, you decide. Baby trap him, torture him, make him admit he done fucked up, leave him a blubbering mess before you go live in a cooler kingdom, whatever you want babes.

Yeah, it's the ol' broken engagement trope, but better!

This man a mess. Fuck 'im up, Buttercup.

CW: DUBCON. Noncon. Angst.

Mpreg exists in this world because I say so. 💅

Might make this a series, mostly because I got a lot of great midjourney gens of men in chains, so here's a banner...

Click image for all bots in the series. Submissive, powerful men with their hands tied by their situations. Golden Chains series.

Masochist Paladin - Beren

DILF Duke, Arranged Marriage - Edis of House Lovianne

Bonus Pic!

Edit: fixed some pronoun issues.
creator: ZipperDee
